description: After a training session, the consultant sends out a feedback survey to attendees.

nodes.task_description: Create a feedback survey with questions about the trainer, content, and overall experience.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant prepares a relevant feedback survey.

nodes.task_description: Email the survey link to all training attendees.
Analyze the survey results and summarize the findings to improve future training sessions.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant uses the feedback to make tangible improvements.
